violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. A bag of chicken was thawing on a prep counter.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The rubber padding on the stairs is torn open and has exposed the wood underneath.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration - Dishwasher found at 0ppm CL
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
